notes: 2026-06-13 GPU1 D320 h120 first-checkpoint capacity test. D320/L12/loop6/all-loop, batch48, bf16/statepassing, clean fixed FutureSeed, no scratch; same h120 first-checkpoint curriculum ending at step6800. Result: h96/h108/h120/h132 loop6 exact=0.4336/0.0508/0.0000/0.0000; h120 blank_acc=0.5000; train CE=0.7799 after 8345.7s. This is worse than the D256 clean h120 curve at comparable checkpoint (h96~0.994, h108~0.820, h120~0.014) and worse than no-noise scratch on h96/h108. Lesson: blind width at lower batch and same step budget does not scale the frontier; h120 remains a data/optimization/global-consistency cliff. Stop D320 same-budget repeats; only revisit width with activation checkpointing or longer/effective-batch scaling.
